meaning: adj.相等的,均等的,胜任的,平静的,合适的,不相上下的n.相等的事物(或数量),对手,匹敌,同辈vt.等于,比得上
examples: We are equal in every way.
They had fought hard for equal rights.
Marriage should be an equal partnership.
Laura Linney is sort of the lead, but they both get about equal screen time.
Of course, just eliminating meat from the plate doesn't always equal a healthy meal.
